products.name: HVC Fan Coil Temperature Control Valve
products.desc: HVAC fan coil control valve, precisely regulates coolant/hot water flow based on room temperature feedback, RS485, 15–30% energy savings.
products.overview: The HVC Fan Coil Temperature Control Valve is the core control element in HVAC fan coil systems. It precisely regulates chilled/hot water flow to each fan coil unit based on room temperature feedback, maintaining room temperature at the set point and achieving 15–30% energy savings across the entire chiller system. Compatible with AC220V and DC24V power. RS485 for direct thermostat connection.
features: Precise room temperature control: auto-adjusts valve opening based on real-time sensor feedback — ±0.5°C accuracy
Energy savings 15–30%: eliminates over-supply of cooling/heating medium to the fan coil unit
Fan speed interlocking: when valve opening is small, fan speed automatically reduces — reduces noise and saves energy
Built-in freeze protection and overcurrent protection — extends actuator and valve service life
Direct RS485 connection to room thermostat — no intermediate controller needed
Dual power supply: AC 220V ±10% and DC 24V ±5%

products.name: HTC Battery Room Temperature Collector
products.desc: Battery-powered wireless room temperature collector — no wiring, flexible installation for any space.
products.overview: The HTT Room (HTC) Battery-powered Room Temperature Collector wirelessly measures room temperature in heating/cooling network buildings and transmits data to the platform via LoRa / 433MHz / NB-IoT / 4G. Designed for ultra-low power consumption — battery lasts up to 6 years. Anti-tamper detection. Can also control fan coil valve opening. No wiring required — mount with 3M tape.
features: Wireless 433MHz pairing with compatible fan coil control valves — direct zone-level control without a gateway
Dual built-in temperature sensors for fast, accurate room temperature detection
Anti-tamper alarm: activates immediately when unit is removed from wall
Battery life up to 6 years — no maintenance required throughout entire HVAC seasons
User-settable target temperature via on-device buttons
Patented industrial design (patent no. ZL201730184482.5)

products.name: HHU Ultrasonic Heat Meter
products.desc: Smart ultrasonic heat/cold energy meter, GB/T32224-2020 & JJG225-2024 compliant, IP65/67/68, RS485/M-Bus/4G/NB-IoT, PT1000 sensor.
products.overview: The HHU Ultrasonic Heat Energy Meter measures heating and cooling energy in district heating, central air conditioning and building energy management systems. Ultrasonic flow measurement means no moving parts, long service life and minimal maintenance. Class 2 accuracy. Supports M-Bus, RS485, NB-IoT and 4G for remote data collection. IP65–IP68 waterproofing.

specs.label: Flow DN50
specs.value: Q1: 0.6 m³/h; Q2: 15 m³/h; Q4: 30 m³/h

specs.label: Flow DN65
specs.value: Q1: 1 m³/h; Q2: 25 m³/h; Q4: 50 m³/h

specs.label: Flow DN80
specs.value: Q1: 1.6 m³/h; Q2: 40 m³/h; Q4: 80 m³/h

specs.label: Flow DN150
specs.value: Q1: 6 m³/h; Q2: 150 m³/h; Q4: 300 m³/h

features: High-quality imported piezoelectric transducers — stable, consistent ultrasonic signal with no drift over time
PT1000 platinum resistance temperature sensor + precision circuit — highly accurate ΔT measurement (resolution 0.01°C)
Self-diagnostic function: detects communication faults, low power, tampering — displays error codes and auto-saves data before shutdown
Remote data transmission via M-Bus / RS485 / NB-IoT / 4G for centralised billing and energy management
Detachable design: mountable in any of 4 orientations — easy reading, simple on-site operation
Dual heating and cooling energy measurement in the same meter — suitable for district heating and central A/C
IP65 / IP67 / IP68 protection — suitable for damp plant rooms, underground meter pits and outdoor installation

products.name: PICV Large Caliber Pressure Independent Valve
products.desc: Large caliber PICV with integrated ultrasonic flow meter, temperature sensor, smart valve control, and 4G/RS485 for intelligent building energy management.
products.overview: The PICV-L Large Caliber PICV Energy Valve is designed for AHU, primary chiller plant and main distribution pipework. Integrates Class 2 ultrasonic flow measurement, dual temperature sensors and precision electric valve control in one device. Remote valve control and real-time energy monitoring via 4G or RS485. IP68 for plant room environments.
features: Class 2 ultrasonic flow measurement: wide turndown ratio, unaffected by water quality, no moving parts, zero maintenance
High-quality piezoelectric chip and dedicated microprocessor: low power, high EMI resistance, stable long-term accuracy
38,000 mAh battery with >6 year life — wireless plant-room installation without power cable
Ball valve + large-torque actuator (120 N·m, 33,100:1 gear ratio): reliable high-force operation on large-bore pipes
Auto self-flushing prevents scale accumulation and clogging inside the valve
Dual 4G / RS485 communication for flexible integration with any BMS or energy management platform
Manual operation override available during power failure — full mechanical backup

products.name: HVA Unit IoT Intelligent Valve
products.desc: IoT flow balance valve for centralized cooling/heating networks. Integrates temperature sensing, M-Bus/RS485/NB-IoT/4G/LoRa for whole-network hydraulic balance.
products.overview: The HVA IoT Intelligent Valve is designed for centralized chilled water and district heating networks. It connects to the cloud via M-Bus, NB-IoT, 4G or LoRa and performs real-time hydraulic balancing across building units — adjusting valve position based on return temperature to prevent over-cooling / over-heating. Large built-in battery (38,000 mAh) provides years of wireless operation.
features: High-precision 40Cr steel gear train: more durable than powder metallurgy — high torque, low loss
Large motor starting torque with low temperature rise — reliable cold-start in low-ambient conditions
Default M-Bus communication; selectable NB-IoT / 4G / RS485 / LoRa without hardware change
Integrated on-site manual switch and position scale — valve position readable and adjustable without tools
SS304 high-strength valve body and ball — superior corrosion and wear resistance for long service life
Monthly auto-exercise (optional): prevents scale build-up and mechanical seizure
Valve retains last position on power failure or communication loss — safe fail-stay behaviour
1% aperture step adjustment, 0–100% full-range proportional control
